entity.summary: Aptos-based decentralized exchange that launched in June 2025 and entered a phased voluntary shutdown in May 2026. Tapp Exchange announced on 2026-05-01 that the protocol would remain available through 2026-05-31, after which its frontend would be taken offline and remaining withdrawals would require direct interaction with on-chain smart contracts.
entity.notes: Launch date is normalized to 2025-06-01 because contemporary shutdown reporting establishes June 2025 but not an exact launch day. The dead classification records the official end of the operated protocol frontend and normal service; immutable smart contracts may remain accessible for direct withdrawals. death_reason is voluntary_shutdown because the team announced a staged wind-down without reporting a hack or insolvency as the cause.

events.title: Tapp Exchange launched on Aptos
events.description: Contemporary shutdown reporting states that Tapp Exchange launched in June 2025 as a V4-style decentralized exchange in the Aptos ecosystem.
events.notes: Month-level launch date normalized to the first day of June 2025 because an exact public launch day was not established.

events.title: Tapp Exchange announced a phased protocol shutdown
events.description: Tapp Exchange announced that it had begun winding down the protocol. The team said normal access and withdrawals would remain available through 2026-05-31 and asked users to remove assets before the frontend was retired.
events.notes: Multiple contemporaneous reports reproduce the operator's May 1 shutdown statement and withdrawal instructions.

events.title: Tapp Exchange reached its frontend shutdown date
events.description: The published wind-down schedule set 2026-05-31 as the end of normal protocol access and the date the Tapp Exchange frontend would be taken offline. After that point, remaining withdrawals were expected to require direct smart-contract interaction.
events.notes: Used as the terminal operated-service marker even though underlying on-chain contracts may remain technically callable.

evidence.title: Aptos DEX Tapp Exchange to shut down, withdrawals open until end of May
evidence.notes: Confirms that Tapp Exchange launched in June 2025 as a V4-style DEX on Aptos.

evidence.title: Aptos-Based DEX Tapp Exchange to Shut Down, Urges Users to Withdraw by May 31
evidence.notes: Confirms the June 2025 launch timing and Aptos ecosystem context.

evidence.title: Aptos-Based DEX Tapp Exchange to Shut Down, Urges Users to Withdraw by May 31
evidence.notes: Reports the operator's phased wind-down announcement and request that users withdraw before May 31.

evidence.title: Tapp Exchange will gradually cease operations, and users must withdraw their assets before May 31
evidence.notes: Reproduces the official shutdown timetable and continued withdrawal availability through May 31.

evidence.title: Tapp Exchange will shut down on May 31, 2026
evidence.notes: Confirms that Tapp Exchange announced the protocol closure process on May 1.

evidence.title: Tapp Exchange has announced it will cease operations, and its front-end will be taken offline on May 31
evidence.notes: Reiterates the May 31 frontend shutdown date and direct smart-contract withdrawal fallback.

evidence.title: Aptos DEX Tapp Exchange to shut down, withdrawals open until end of May
evidence.notes: Confirms full protocol functionality and withdrawals only through the end of May 2026.

evidence.title: Tapp Exchange will cease operations on May 31, 2026
evidence.notes: Confirms the May 31 terminal date, frontend retirement, and on-chain withdrawal fallback.
